templates.name: Do you offer free returns?
templates.content: Please note that the price of return shipping is the full responsibility of the customer. Once the item has been received, we will issue a store credit or full refund of the purchase. Returns over $250 are subject to a 15% restocking fee.

templates.name: When will I receive my refund?
templates.content: We process returns and refunds as soon as we receive them. Please allow 7 days from the time your item was received at our warehouse for the refund to appear on your credit card statement.

templates.name: Am I able to request a print placement?
templates.content: We love our customers and try our best to make everyone happy. At this point in time, however, we don't provide a service for print placement preference. Apologies for the inconvenience!

templates.name: Can you retroactively apply a code to my order?
templates.content: Unfortunately, we're unable to retroactively apply a discount code once it has been placed. I really appreciate your patience and understanding on this!

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 877-258-5823 (877-2-JUJUBE) Monday-Friday 8am-5pm PST or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Do you ship tp APO/FPO addresses?
templates.content: Yes, we ship to APO/FPO addresses.

templates.name: Do you offer international shipping?
templates.content: We love to see our bags and accessories travel the world. Here's where you can find detailed info on international shipping - https://jujube.com/pages/international

templates.name: Warranty policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed warranty policy here: https://jujube.attn.tv/sl/sNowOJIX

templates.name: Payment Methods
templates.content: We accept all major Credit/Debit cards, PayPal, ShopPay, AmazonPay, and AfterPay.

templates.name: Cancel / edit
templates.content: Unfortunately, we can't modify, cancel or add to an order once it has been placed. We apologize for the inconvenience.

templates.name: Does the "Be Packed in Amour Des Fleurs" include a changing pad?
templates.content: The Be Packed in Amour Des Fleurs doesn't include a changing pad, it's sold separately.

templates.name: How many items come in the Blind Box?
templates.content: The value is a minimum of $200. It'll have a large bag and several accessories. Each box is hand packed so we can't give a precise number.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at customerservice@ju-ju-be.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: How can I remove stains from the bag?
templates.content: We recommend putting it in a mesh laundry bag to protect the hardware and then washing in cold water on a gentle cycle. Let it air dry for up to a couple days. You can put rolled up terry cloth towels in the pockets to help absorb the moisture from the corners and speed drying. When washing a changing pad you'll need to ensure that all the water is removed before air drying. We suggest putting the washed changing pad on a dry towel and rolling it up tightly to squeeze out the excess water (repeat until all water is removed). We also recommend spot treatment before washing as that'll help loosen up the stains before a regular wash, sometimes even soaking the bag over night in one of these treatments. We've heard things on Motsenbocker Lift Off, Magic Eraser, Boogie Wipes, Shout Wipes, or a paste of Oxy Clean, Dawn dish soap, baking soda works great depending on what the marks are.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $125. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here - https://jujube.com/pages/returns

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content:
Typically, orders have a 7-10 business day processing time, excluding weekends and holidays.
Please note that once your order is processed and shipped by our fulfillment warehouse, it may take 24-48 hours for tracking information to populate in our system. If you have not received tracking information by the 10th business day from the date of order, please reach out to us, and we will work with the warehouse to provide updated tracking details.
For more information and updates, please visit our FAQ page: https://jujube.com/pages/faq.

templates.name: Do you offer gift wrapping?
templates.content: Sorry, but we don't offer gift wrapping at this time.

templates.name: Are your diaper bags waterproof?
templates.content: Most bags are machine washable but not waterproof. Let me know if you need further help.
